expectedProperties: HarmonyOS contract runner 输出 Core 期望的统一 ReaderCorePlatformAdapterContractRunReport JSON。
Core 只导入 redacted run report，不导入 raw cookie/credential/token/localhost bridge 引用。
缺 artifact、缺 required feature、把 unsupported 能力伪装成 pass，都必须 fail-closed。
manifest identity、required features、evidence artifacts、clean-room flags 全部匹配才能通过 Core gate。
HarmonyOS baseline run reports 可以 pass required adapter features 同时保留 unsupported Readium/PDF/CBZ/sync markers。
localhost bridge 不计入本验收口，release_capable: false (HOS-ADR-001)。
failureReasonBound: Without this binding, HarmonyOS contract runner output could be either ignored by Core release intake or over-applied to unrelated release blockers, or localhost bridge evidence could be mistaken for production runtime evidence.
